code:
import io
import string

mut found = false
mut result = ""
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not found
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        result = trimmed
        found = true
      end
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end

if found
  print(result)
else
  print("(none)")
end
